text.notes: Good for short-form, conversion copy and hashtag generation. Requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY.
Local/hosted option for chat-style copy; may require model hosting or HF Inference API key.
Lightweight Claude-style model if accessible via provider.

image.notes: High-quality production stills; may require API key for Stability or hosted SDXL endpoint.
Via OpenRouter-compatible image endpoint if available.
Good fallback; check license for commercial use.

video.notes: High-quality generative video (may require account and credits).
Some OpenRouter-compatible providers expose video endpoints; availability varies.
For human-presenter-style marketing videos (not strictly free).

notes: These are suggested model IDs/providers to preload in the dashboard so users can pick them; availability and free tiers vary by provider and region.
